author: PassengerC07
description: Import, organize, and install AI agent skills from an Obsidian vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: DrBanshan
manifest.description: Import, organize, and install AI agent skills from a vault.
manifest.name: Banshan Skill Hub

name: Banshan Skill Hub

releases.author: DrBanshan
releases.description:
## Initial Release 0.1.0

Banshan Skill Hub is now available as a desktop plugin for importing, organizing, and installing AI agent skills from a vault-managed library.

This first release includes GitHub, local folder, and `npx skills add ...` import flows; visual skill cards with tags, colors, emojis, and details; workflow collections with drag-and-drop ordering; and copy or symlink installation into `.agents/skills`.

It also includes configurable skill storage, install behavior, npx execution, custom sorting, and collection-based bulk install workflows.
releases.name: Release - 0.1.0
